title: At the grocery store
tagline: Find the milk, skip the bag, pay and go.

lines.fi: Moi, anteeks - missä teil on maito?
lines.en: Hi, excuse me - where do you have the milk?
Hi! Over on the back wall, in the cooler.

lines.fi: Ei kiitos, mul on oma kassi.
lines.en: No thanks, I have my own bag.

lines.fi: Kiitos, kuitti tulee mukaan. Hyvää päivänjatkoa!
lines.en: Thanks, the receipt comes with it. Have a nice day!
